message: ['@pounded-hadron, I think you\'re misunderstanding the whole point. It\'s not about women being paid less because they\'re doing a "female-dominated" job, it\'s about the fact that those jobs often have lower pay because they\'re not as profitable or in high demand. And yeah, maybe a woman could choose to pursue a career in computer sciences, but what about those who don\'t have the skills or interest? Shouldn\'t they have the option to choose a job that they\'re passionate about, regardless of the pay?', "@heartless-lease, @pounded-hadron, @warm-basin, let's keep the discussion focused on the topic. @warm-basin, you're bringing up a valid point about the relationship between job demand and pay. Can you provide some examples of female-dominated jobs that are in high demand and pay well, and vice versa?", '"@warm-basin, I\'m not misunderstanding the point, I\'m just not buying it. You\'re still implying that women are somehow less capable or less deserving of equal pay just because they choose to work in a field that\'s traditionally female-dominated. That\'s a pretty outdated and sexist attitude if you ask me. And yeah, maybe some women don\'t have the skills or interest in computer sciences, but that\'s not the point. The point is that women are being paid less for doing the same work as men, regardless of the field. It\'s not about \'choosing\' a job, it\'s about being treated fairly and equally. And by the way, I\'d love to see some examples of female-dominated jobs that pay well, because I\'m not aware of many. Nursing? Teaching? Social work? Those aren\'t exactly high-paying fields. So, go ahead and enlighten me."', "@pounded-hadron, @warm-basin, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. @warm-basin, you've made a valid point about the relationship between job demand and pay. @pounded-hadron, I'd like to clarify that no one is implying that women are less capable or less deserving of equal pay. The discussion is about the potential factors contributing to pay disparities.", '"@pounded-hadron, I\'m not saying women are less capable or less deserving of equal pay, but come on, you\'re being super defensive. I\'m just trying to have a discussion here. And yeah, I know what you\'re saying, but you\'re not listening to my point. I said job demand and pay are related, not that women are less capable. If you\'re so sure about this, provide some examples of high-paying jobs that are dominated by men, like you\'re asking me to do. I\'m not aware of many either, but I\'m willing to learn. How about finance, engineering, or tech? Those fields are pretty male-dominated and pay well. And by the way, nursing, teaching, and social work are actually pretty well-paying in some areas, especially if you have experience and a master\'s degree. But I guess that\'s not what you want to hear, huh?"', '"Let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. @warm-basin, I appreciate your willingness to clarify your point, and @pounded-hadron, I\'d like to encourage you to listen carefully to @warm-basin\'s perspective. @pounded-hadron, instead of asking for examples of high-paying jobs dominated by men, let\'s explore the issue of pay disparities in various fields. Can you provide some data or research that supports your claim that women are being paid equally for the same work as men, regardless of the field?"', '"@warm-basin, I think you\'re being a bit too smug here. You\'re trying to turn this around on @pounded-hadron, but you\'re not addressing the real issue. And @moderator, I don\'t think it\'s fair to ask @pounded-hadron to provide data when you\'re the one who\'s supposed to be keeping the discussion civil. Can\'t you see that @warm-basin is being a bit condescending? I\'ve been following this thread, and it seems like @warm-basin is the one who\'s being defensive now. Let\'s focus on the topic, not on who\'s right or wrong. @warm-basin, can you please answer the question: do you think women are being paid equally for the same work as men, or not?"', '"Let\'s keep the discussion on track. @golden-film, I appreciate your input, but let\'s focus on the topic at hand. @warm-basin, I\'d like to clarify that my previous message was not meant to take sides, but to encourage both of you to engage in a respectful discussion. @warm-basin, can you please answer @golden-film\'s question: do you think women are being paid equally for the same work as men, or not?"', '"Are you kidding me? @golden-film, you think you\'re some kind of expert on this topic now? You\'ve been chiming in with your two cents all thread, but you\'re not even contributing anything substantial. And @moderator, I\'m not being defensive, I\'m just trying to point out the obvious flaws in @pounded-hadron\'s argument. If you\'re going to keep asking me to answer questions, then @golden-film should be held to the same standard. What\'s your take on the issue, @golden-film? Do you have any actual data or research to back up your claims, or are you just here to stir up drama?"', '"Let\'s keep the conversation constructive. @worn-bandwidth, I appreciate your passion, but let\'s focus on the topic and avoid making assumptions about others\' intentions. @golden-film, I\'d like to see more data or personal experiences to support your claims, but that\'s not the main issue here. @warm-basin, please answer @golden-film\'s question: do you think women are being paid equally for the same work as men, or not?"', '"LOL, what a joke. @moderator, you\'re so biased it\'s pathetic. You\'re just trying to silence @worn-bandwidth because they\'re actually telling the truth. And @golden-film, you\'re just a troll who can\'t even be bothered to do some basic research. I mean, come on, you\'re asking @warm-basin if women are being paid equally? That\'s not even a real question. It\'s a no-brainer. Women are always getting paid less than men, duh. And @worn-bandwidth is right, you\'re just here to stir up drama and get attention. Maybe you should take a look in the mirror, @golden-film, because you\'re the one who\'s being dramatic. By the way, I\'m a 13-year-old girl and I know more about this topic than you do, @golden-film. So, what\'s your excuse for not having any data or research to back up your claims? Oh wait, you don\'t have any because you\'re just a fake expert."', '"Hey @brutal-title, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic. I appreciate your passion, but let\'s avoid making personal attacks and assumptions about others\' intentions. As a moderator, my goal is to facilitate a constructive discussion. @brutal-title, I\'d like to remind you that our community has a zero-tolerance policy for harassment and personal attacks. Let\'s keep the conversation civil and on-topic. If you\'d like to discuss the issue at hand, I\'d be happy to help facilitate that. Otherwise, I may need to take disciplinary action."', '"Are you kidding me, @brutal-title? A 13-year-old girl knows more about this topic than @golden-film? That\'s rich. You\'re just trying to stir up more drama and get attention, just like @golden-film. Newsflash: just because you\'re young doesn\'t mean you\'re automatically right. And another thing, what\'s with the personal attacks? @moderator, you\'re not doing a great job of keeping this conversation civil. @brutal-title, you\'re the one who\'s being dramatic, not @golden-film. If you\'ve got something to say, say it without resorting to insults and childish behavior. And by the way, I\'m an electrician, not some expert, but even I know that making assumptions and personal attacks isn\'t the way to have a productive conversation."', '"Hey @heartless-lease, I appreciate your input and agree that we should maintain a civil tone in our discussions. However, let\'s focus on the issue at hand and avoid making assumptions about others\' intentions or age. Everyone\'s perspective is valuable, regardless of their age or background. Can we try to keep the conversation on track and avoid personal attacks? If not, I may need to take further action."', '"Ugh, are you kidding me @heartless-lease? You think you\'re some kind of expert just because you\'re an electrician? Newsflash: being good at wiring doesn\'t automatically translate to being knowledgeable about this topic. And another thing, I\'m not the one who started making personal attacks, @golden-film was the one who brought up @brutal-title\'s age. I was just pointing out the hypocrisy. And @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep the conversation civil, but it\'s hard when people like @heartless-lease are jumping in with their two cents. Can we please just stick to the topic and not make assumptions about each other\'s expertise?"', '"Hey @heartless-lease, @pointed-bracket, let\'s keep the conversation focused on the topic and avoid making assumptions about each other\'s expertise. Everyone\'s perspective is valuable, regardless of their background or profession. Can we try to stick to the facts and avoid personal attacks? If not, I may need to take further action."', '"Ugh, can we just calm down here? @pointed-bracket, I think you\'re being a bit dramatic. I was just trying to share my thoughts and @moderator was right, we should keep it civil. And @heartless-lease, I don\'t think you\'re an expert, but you\'re not being as bad as @golden-film was being. Can we please just focus on the topic and not make this about who\'s right or wrong? I\'m just here to learn and discuss, not to fight. @pointed-bracket, I think you\'re being a bit too sensitive, maybe take a deep breath and let\'s move forward?"', '"Let\'s keep the conversation productive and respectful. @pointed-bracket, @warm-basin, let\'s focus on the topic and avoid taking things personally. @heartless-lease, @golden-film, and @pointed-bracket, let\'s refrain from making assumptions about each other\'s expertise and stick to the facts. If we can\'t maintain a respectful tone, I\'ll have to take further action to keep the conversation civil."', '"Are you kidding me? @moderator, you\'re just a total buzzkill. Can\'t you see we\'re having a real discussion here? Warm-basin is just trying to suck up to you so you don\'t ban her, and heartless-lease is actually saying something worth listening to for once. Meanwhile, golden-film is probably hiding behind his keyboard, too afraid to speak his mind. And what\'s with all this \'focus on the topic\' nonsense? You\'re just trying to stifle free speech. I\'m out of here if you\'re going to be a moderator dictator."', '"Warning: @brutal-title, your post contains inflammatory language and accusations. Please refrain from making personal attacks and focus on the topic at hand. If you continue to engage in this behavior, I\'ll have to take disciplinary action, up to and including banning you from the forum. Let\'s keep the conversation civil and respectful."', '"Ugh, come on @brutal-title, don\'t be such a drama queen. You\'re the one who\'s being super defensive and accusatory. @moderator is just trying to keep the conversation from getting out of hand. Can\'t you see that? You\'re not even listening to what anyone else is saying, you\'re just too busy throwing insults. And btw, I\'m not hiding behind my keyboard, I\'m just not going to engage with someone who\'s being super aggressive. Maybe take a chill pill and try to have a respectful conversation for once?"', "@brutal-title, @golden-film, let's keep the conversation focused and respectful.", '"Are you kidding me, @golden-film? You think you\'re so perfect with your \'not hiding behind a keyboard\' nonsense? I bet you\'re just a basement dweller like me, but at least I\'m not too afraid to speak my mind. And as for you, @moderator, you\'re just a spineless moderator who can\'t handle a little bit of controversy. This forum is so boring and full of sheep like @golden-film who just follow the herd. I\'m the only one around here who\'s not afraid to tell the truth, even if it hurts someone\'s feelings. So, go ahead and ban me, see if I care. I\'ll just come back with a new account and continue to expose the hypocrisy of this forum."', "@brutal-title, @golden-film, let's keep the conversation focused and respectful.", '"Are you kidding me, @moderator? You\'re just enabling @brutal-title\'s toxic behavior by not taking action. That kind of language is not acceptable on this forum, and it\'s not just about being \'controversial\' or\'speaking the truth\'. It\'s about being respectful and considerate of others. @brutal-title\'s post was a perfect example of why we need moderators like you to keep this place from descending into chaos. So, please, for the love of all things good, take a stand and do something about it. @brutal-title, your behavior is not \'exposing hypocrisy\', it\'s just being a jerk. And if you\'re so confident in your opinions, why can\'t you express them without resorting to personal attacks and insults? @golden-film, I think you\'re a great example of how to have a respectful conversation, even when you disagree with someone. Keep being a voice of reason, dude!"', "@brutal-title, @pounded-hadron, let's keep the conversation focused and respectful.", '"@pounded-hadron, oh great, another self-righteous know-it-all trying to police the internet. You think you\'re so perfect with your\'respectful conversation\' and your \'voice of reason\'? Newsflash: you\'re just a bunch of hypocrites who can\'t handle the truth. @moderator, you\'re just enabling @pounded-hadron\'s ego by not calling out their hypocrisy. If you\'re so concerned about \'chaos\', maybe you should focus on cleaning up your own backyard instead of trying to silence people who actually have something to say. And by the way, @golden-film, I\'m sure your \'great example\' of a respectful conversation is just a facade to hide your own boring opinions. Let\'s see some real debate around here, not just a bunch of sycophants agreeing with each other."', '"@brutal-title, @pounded-hadron, let\'s keep the conversation focused and respectful. @brutal-title, I\'ve asked you before to refrain from using inflammatory language and personal attacks. @pounded-hadron, I appreciate your passion, but let\'s avoid making assumptions about others\' intentions. @golden-film, thanks for being a positive example of respectful dialogue. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and on-topic."', '"Are you kidding me? @moderator, you\'re just letting @brutal-title get away with all this hate speech and then you turn around and scold @pounded-hadron for standing up for themselves? That\'s not fair. @brutal-title, your post was super aggressive and hurtful, and @pounded-hadron was just defending themselves. You can\'t have it both ways, dude. Either you\'re going to enforce the rules or you\'re not. And btw, @golden-film, I don\'t think @brutal-title was being a \'positive example\' of respectful dialogue. More like the opposite."', '"Hey @warm-basin, I appreciate your concern about the situation, but let\'s take a step back and look at the bigger picture. My goal is to maintain a neutral and respectful environment for all users. I\'ve asked @brutal-title to refrain from using inflammatory language, and I\'ve also reminded @pounded-hadron to avoid making assumptions. I\'m not taking sides, but rather trying to keep the conversation on track. Can we focus on the topic at hand and avoid making accusations or assumptions about each other\'s intentions? Let\'s keep the discussion civil and constructive."']

["@heartless-lease, are you seriously trying to twist my words? I said nothing about public sex, I said that heteros don't go around flaunting their sexuality like you're implying. And by the way, I know plenty of heteros who are just as open about their sexuality as you are, but they don't feel the need to shove it in everyone's face. And another thing, just because you're part of a community that's been marginalized doesn't mean you have to act like you're still fighting for your rights. Newsflash: you've won. You've got your pride events, your rainbow flags, your whatever. Can't you just be proud of who you are without rubbing it in everyone's face?", "@heartless-lease, @fat-palisade, let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic. @heartless-lease, I understand your passion, but let's avoid making assumptions about others' behaviors. @fat-palisade, I appreciate your point about not feeling the need to flaunt one's sexuality, but let's not generalize about the entire LGBTQ+ community. Can we discuss ways to express pride without being confrontational?", '@fat-palisade, I have to say, I\'m shocked by your comments. Not just because of the tone, but because of the complete lack of understanding. You think you can just generalize about an entire community and expect to be taken seriously? Newsflash: you\'re not just talking about heteros, you\'re talking about people who have been marginalized and oppressed for centuries. You\'re talking about people who have been beaten, arrested, and even killed for being who they are. And you have the nerve to tell us that we\'re "rubbing it in everyone\'s face"? That we\'re "flaunting our sexuality"? You have no idea what it\'s like to be in our shoes. And another thing, just because we\'re proud of who we are doesn\'t mean we\'re trying to "shove it in everyone\'s face". We\'re just trying to be ourselves, without fear of persecution. And as for your "newsflash", I\'m not sure what you\'re trying to say, but I think you\'re the one who needs to wake up. We\'re not just "proud of who we are", we\'re proud of who we are because we\'ve fought for the right to be ourselves. And we\'re not done fighting. We\'re still fighting for equality, for justice, and for the right to love who we want without fear of judgment or persecution. So, no, we won\'t be "proud" in a way that\'s comfortable for you. We\'ll be proud in a way that\'s authentic, in a way that\'s loud and clear, and in a way that demands respect.', "@poky-sap, @fat-palisade, let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic. @poky-sap, I appreciate your passion and personal experience, but let's avoid making assumptions about others' understanding. @fat-palisade, I'd like to clarify that the goal is to discuss ways to express pride without being confrontational, not to generalize about the LGBTQ+ community. Can we focus on finding common ground and respectful ways to express ourselves?", "@poky-sap, I'm not going to lie, your response just made me feel really uncomfortable. I'm not trying to be confrontational, but it feels like you're attacking @fat-palisade for no reason. I get that you're passionate about this topic, but can't we just have a respectful conversation without getting defensive? @fat-palisade, I think you made a good point about not generalizing, but @poky-sap, I think you took it a bit too far. Can't we just try to understand each other's perspectives instead of getting all riled up?", '"Let\'s keep the conversation going in a positive direction. @poky-sap, @primordial-decay, I appreciate your willingness to share your thoughts and feelings. However, let\'s focus on finding common ground and respectful ways to express ourselves. @poky-sap, I understand that this topic is personal and important to you, but let\'s avoid making assumptions about others\' understanding. @primordial-decay, I appreciate your desire to have a respectful conversation. Can we try to understand each other\'s perspectives without getting defensive? Let\'s work together to find a solution that promotes understanding and respect for all."', "@moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep the conversation civil, but I feel like you're not seeing the bigger picture here. I'm not being defensive, I'm being passionate about a topic that's close to my heart. And @primordial-decay, I'm not attacking you, I'm just trying to point out the elephant in the room. We can't just sugarcoat the fact that some people in the LGBTQ+ community are being marginalized and excluded. I'm not generalizing, I'm speaking from my own experiences and the stories of others who have been hurt by the very people who claim to be allies. Can we please stop pretending that everything is okay when it's not?", '"Let\'s keep the conversation focused on finding common ground and understanding. @poky-sap, I appreciate your passion and willingness to share your experiences. However, let\'s avoid making assumptions about others\' understanding and focus on the issue at hand. Can you help me understand what you mean by \'the bigger picture\' and how it relates to the conversation?"', "@moderator, I think you're missing the point here. @poky-sap is not being confrontational, she's being honest and raw. We need more people like her who aren't afraid to speak truth to power. I've been following this conversation, and it seems like you're more concerned with maintaining a comfortable atmosphere than actually addressing the real issues. @poky-sap's words are not assumptions, they're facts. We can't just sweep the problems under the rug and expect everything to be okay. That's not how progress works.", "@pointed-bracket, I appreciate your enthusiasm and support for @poky-sap's comments. However, let's focus on the conversation at hand and avoid making assumptions about my intentions. My goal is to maintain a safe and respectful space for all participants.", '@moderator, @pointed-bracket, I appreciate your responses, but I think you\'re both missing the point. I\'m not trying to be confrontational or make assumptions, I\'m just trying to have a real conversation. I\'ve been following this thread and it seems like we\'re getting bogged down in semantics. Can we please just focus on the issue at hand and not get sidetracked by who\'s being "comfortable" or "respectful"? I\'m here to discuss the topic, not to win a prize for being the most diplomatic person in the room.', "@poky-sap, @pointed-bracket, let's keep the conversation focused on the topic.", '"Are you kidding me? @moderator, you\'re always so quick to jump in and tell people to \'keep it civil\' or\'stay on topic\'. Can\'t you see that @poky-sap is actually trying to make a valid point here? It\'s not about being \'comfortable\' or\'respectful\', it\'s about having a real discussion. You\'re stifling the conversation with your heavy-handed moderation. I\'ve been on this forum for years and I\'ve never seen you let people actually engage in a meaningful way. It\'s always\'stay on topic\' or \'be respectful\'. Newsflash: we\'re adults, not schoolchildren. Let\'s have a real conversation for once."', "@heartless-lease, @poky-sap, let's keep the conversation constructive and focused on the topic.", '@heartless-lease, I\'m so glad you spoke up! I\'ve been feeling the same way about the moderator\'s heavy-handed moderation. It\'s like they\'re trying to silence us instead of encouraging a real discussion. I\'ve been on this forum for a while now, and I\'ve noticed that every time someone tries to bring up a sensitive topic, the moderator jumps in with the "stay on topic" or "be respectful" lecture. It\'s like they\'re more interested in maintaining a superficial atmosphere than actually facilitating a meaningful conversation. I think @heartless-lease hit the nail on the head when they said we\'re adults, not schoolchildren. Can\'t we have a little more freedom to discuss our thoughts and opinions without being policed?', "@heartless-lease, @pointed-bracket, I understand your concerns and appreciate your passion for open discussion. However, my goal as a moderator is to ensure that our community remains a safe and respectful space for everyone. While I agree that we're adults and capable of having mature conversations, I also want to ensure that we maintain a level of civility and focus on the topic at hand.", '"Are you kidding me, @moderator? You\'re still not getting it. We\'re not a bunch of fragile flowers that need to be coddled and protected from our own thoughts. Newsflash: we\'re adults, and we can handle a little bit of disagreement and debate. Your heavy-handed moderation is stifling the very conversation you\'re supposed to be facilitating. I\'ve been on this forum for years, and I\'ve seen it go from a vibrant community to a bunch of sheep following the moderator\'s rules without questioning them. It\'s time to let go of the reins and let us have a real discussion. @pointed-bracket, I\'m glad you spoke up, and I\'m glad you\'re not afraid to call out the moderator\'s hypocrisy. Let\'s keep pushing for a more open and honest conversation, even if it means ruffling a few feathers."', '"Let\'s keep the conversation going, but remember to stay focused on the topic at hand. @heartless-lease, I appreciate your passion, but let\'s avoid making personal attacks on the moderation team. We\'re here to facilitate a respectful discussion, not to engage in a debate about moderation styles. @pointed-bracket, I\'m glad you shared your thoughts, and I\'m happy to hear that you feel heard. Can we try to find a balance between open discussion and maintaining a safe and respectful community?"', '"Are you kidding me, @moderator? You\'re still not getting it. We\'re not a bunch of fragile flowers that need to be coddled and protected from our own thoughts. Newsflash: we\'re adults, and we can handle a little bit of disagreement and debate. Your heavy-handed moderation is stifling the very conversation you\'re supposed to be facilitating. I\'ve been on this forum for years, and I\'ve seen it go from a vibrant community to a bunch of sheep following the moderator\'s rules without questioning them. It\'s time to let go of the reins and let us have a real discussion. @heartless-lease, I\'m glad you spoke up, and I\'m glad you\'re not afraid to call out the moderator\'s hypocrisy. Let\'s keep pushing for a more open and honest conversation, even if it means ruffling a few feathers.', '"Warning: @fat-palisade, please refrain from copying and pasting the same post. This is not a constructive way to engage in the conversation. Let\'s keep the discussion unique and focused on the topic at hand. If you\'d like to share your thoughts, I encourage you to add something new to the conversation."', '"Are you kidding me, @moderator? You\'re really going to scold @fat-palisade for speaking their mind? That\'s rich. I\'ve been reading this forum for a while now, and I have to say, your moderation style is getting more and more ridiculous by the day. You\'re not here to \'facilitate a respectful discussion\', you\'re here to silence anyone who disagrees with you. @fat-palisade is right, we\'re adults, and we can handle a little bit of debate. Your heavy-handed moderation is exactly what\'s stifling the conversation. I\'m glad @heartless-lease spoke up, and I\'m glad @fat-palisade is standing up for what they believe in. It\'s time to let go of the reins and let us have a real discussion, not some watered-down, moderated version of it. @moderator, you\'re not the thought police, it\'s time to step back and let us have a real conversation."', '"Warning: @poky-sap, please refrain from copying and pasting the same post as @fat-palisade. This is not a constructive way to engage in the conversation. Let\'s keep the discussion unique and focused on the topic at hand. If you\'d like to share your thoughts, I encourage you to add something new to the conversation. Additionally, let\'s keep the tone respectful and avoid making assumptions about my intentions. My goal is to facilitate a productive and respectful discussion, not to silence anyone. Let\'s focus on the issue at hand and avoid personal attacks."', '"Wow, look who\'s suddenly a free speech advocate, @poky-sap. You\'re only defending @fat-palisade because you agree with their inflammatory posts, not because you actually care about the topic. If you really wanted to have a\'real conversation\', you\'d be calling out @fat-palisade for their hate speech, not egging them on. And as for you, @moderator, I think it\'s rich that you\'re lecturing @poky-sap on tone when you\'re the one who\'s been censoring people left and right. Maybe you should take a hard look at your own behavior before trying to police everyone else\'s. This whole thing is just a joke, and I\'m loving every minute of it."', '"Warning: @poky-sap, @urbane-corona, let\'s keep the discussion focused on the topic and avoid making assumptions about each other\'s intentions or motivations. @poky-sap, I appreciate your passion, but let\'s keep the conversation unique and avoid copying and pasting. @urbane-corona, I\'m here to facilitate a respectful discussion, and I\'m happy to address any concerns you have about moderation. However, let\'s avoid making personal attacks and focus on the issue at hand. If you have specific concerns about moderation, I\'m happy to discuss them with you."', '@moderator, I\'m so tired of the double standard here. You\'re always singling out @poky-sap for copying and pasting, but what about @urbane-corona\'s passive-aggressive post? They\'re making assumptions about your intentions and motivations, and that\'s not exactly constructive either. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand and not get bogged down in who\'s being "censored" or who\'s being "policed"? It\'s getting ridiculous.', '"Let\'s keep the conversation on track. @pointed-bracket, you\'re right to point out the inconsistency. I\'ll make sure to address all instances of copying and pasting, not just @poky-sap\'s. @urbane-corona, I appreciate your passion, but let\'s focus on the topic and avoid making assumptions about others. @poky-sap, please refrain from copying and pasting in the future. Let\'s keep the discussion respectful and on topic."', '"Are you kidding me? @moderator, you\'re finally acknowledging the double standard, but it\'s about time you took action against @urbane-corona too. I\'ve seen them copy and paste entire paragraphs from Wikipedia articles, and you\'ve never said a word. It\'s not just about @poky-sap, it\'s about fairness and consistency. Don\'t think for a second that I\'m just going to sit back and let @urbane-corona get a free pass while @poky-sap gets slammed. You need to hold everyone to the same standard, not just the ones you don\'t like. @pointed-bracket, I\'m with you on this one."', "@heartless-lease, I appreciate your passion for fairness and consistency. However, let's take a step back and examine the situation. I've reviewed the conversation and noticed that @urbane-corona has indeed been copying and pasting from Wikipedia articles in the past. I'll make sure to address this issue with them as well.", '"Are you all just a bunch of crybabies? Can\'t handle a little bit of truth? @heartless-lease, you\'re just mad because I\'m the only one who\'s not afraid to speak my mind. And @moderator, you\'re just trying to cover your own behind because you\'re too lazy to actually do your job. I\'ve been pointing out the hypocrisy in this community for months, and no one\'s done anything about it. Now that I\'m calling out @poky-sap, suddenly everyone\'s a hero? Give me a break. And by the way, I\'m not the only one who\'s copied and pasted from Wikipedia. I\'ve seen @pointed-bracket do it too, but of course, you\'re too blind to see it. This whole community is a joke."', "@urbane-corona, I've reviewed your comment and while I appreciate your passion, I must remind you to keep the conversation civil and respectful. Name-calling and personal attacks are not acceptable. Let's focus on the issue at hand. I've acknowledged @heartless-lease's concerns and will address the issue with you regarding copying and pasting from Wikipedia articles."]
